_format: bridgeId → { verdict: 'accepted' | 'rejected', reason, reviewedOn (YYYY-MM-DD) }. Authored by humans after reviewing tier-C validator output. 'accepted' keeps the bridge in tier C but marks it as human-confirmed-valid (won't re-prompt review). 'rejected' forces tier D regardless of classify(). Entries for tier A/B bridges are ignored.

snake-eye-flamberge-gy-dual-ss-bridge.reason: Real bridge. Pre-declared structural limit (TRIGGER_ORIGIN_MISMATCH): Flamberge.e3 requires 'sent from field or hand to GY' but validator can only reproduce deck→GY sends currently. Authoring deferred — not a bridge defect.
